final_saved_checkpoint_note: run_finetune.py saves the last-epoch model state, not the best-val-loss checkpoint (checkpoint-best from epoch 1). Reported metrics are from the epoch-2, slightly overfit model. Known bug, not yet fixed.
weights_note: Also currently identical to checkpoints/final_adapter (the live path scripts/run_finetune.py writes to), since no later run has overwritten it yet. Do not rely on checkpoints/final_adapter staying this way -- it will be silently overwritten by the next training run.
